creator: frank@dynamical-systems.org
text:
This port was actually intended for the freshly released Slackware 11.0,
but I ran into trouble with yet unsupported Linux system calls. That's why
I had to downgrade to 10.1 which, however, is still supplied with updates
and vulnerability fixes by the Slackware team. Compared with the default
FC4 linux_base port this one consumes considerably less disk space and looks 
more user-friendly under chroot. There are a few aspects which should be
pointed for handling Slackware:

[1] The installation is basically done by running Slackware's installpkg
in a chroot'd environment. For this purpose the contents of the Slackware
rootdisks are to be extracted, which requires to invoke mdconfig(8) (resp.
vnconfig(8) on FreeBSD 4.x). Consequently, 'make extract' requires suitable
permissions and will fail for a generic user.  

[2] The variables OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT and MASTER_SITE_SLACKWARE are
to be set appropriately. Please see slackware.make.conf below and append
it to your /etc/make.conf when trying this port. 

[3] The following ports have shown conflicts with the Slackware base port:
	audio/linux-alsa-lib
	devel/linux-glib2
	ftp/linux-curl
	graphics/linux-jpeg
	graphics/linux-png
	graphics/linux-tiff
	security/linux-openssl
	textproc/linux-expat 

These are normally treated as dependencies, and then there are no problems.
However, doing 'make install' for any of the listed ports would damage the 
Slackware installation. For the sake of convenience I have appended a patch
(slackware_conflicts.diff) which might be helpful to fix this issue.

Fix: OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT=slackware

MASTER_SITE_SLACKWARE= \
	ftp://mirrors.usc.edu/pub/linux/distributions/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.belnet.be/packages/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://slackware.mirrors.tds.net/pub/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.heanet.ie/mirrors/ftp.slackware.com/pub/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.slackware.no/pub/linux/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.isu.edu.tw/pub/Linux/Slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://slackware.cs.utah.edu/pub/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.mirror.ac.uk/sites/ftp.slackware.com/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.scarlet.be/pub/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.funet.fi/pub/mirrors/ftp.slackware.com/pub/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.man.poznan.pl/pub/linux/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.gwdg.de/pub/linux/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://sunsite.informatik.rwth-aachen.de/pub/Linux/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	http://lmlinux.com/distros/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	http://www.mirror.ac.uk/mirror/ftp.slackware.com/%SUBDIR%/ \
	http://mirrors.easynews.com/linux/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.linux.cz/pub/linux/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.lip6.fr/pub/linux/distributions/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.ntua.gr/pub/linux/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.eutelia.it/pub/Slackware_Mirror/%SUBDIR%/ \
	http://mirror.switch.ch/ftp/mirror/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://slackware.osuosl.org/pub/slackware/%SUBDIR%/ \
	ftp://ftp.slackware.com/pub/slackware/%SUBDIR%/
--- slackware.make.conf ends here ---
